seoTitle: Ultimo vs Unanderra — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Ultimo and Unanderra. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Ultimo and Unanderra.
heading: Ultimo vs Unanderra — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Ultimo, New South Wales and Unanderra, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Ultimo has a lower overall climate risk score (44/100) compared to Unanderra (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Ultimo or Unanderra safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Ultimo has a flood risk score of 32/100, while Unanderra scores 56/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Ultimo scores 64/100 for bushfire risk. Unanderra scores 43/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Ultimo or Unanderra?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Ultimo has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.17% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
